channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Google's new Home Speaker is here: Gemini built-in, upgraded sound, and a $99 price tag
item.description: Google's new Home Speaker pairs Gemini AI with upgraded audio and a surprisingly affordable $99 price tag.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google's new home speaker
media:content.media:text: Google's new home speaker
media:content.media:title: Google's new home speaker

item.title: Samsung hits a triple: One UI 9 Beta 3 is here for enrolled Galaxy S26 phones
item.description: Samsung reportedly rolled out One UI 9 Beta 3 to Galaxy S26 phones in a few regions.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra

item.title: The OnePlus 16 might be the closest we've come to a bezel-free phone
item.description: Bezels? What bezels?
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: OnePlus's Never Settle motto on the OnePlus 15's display
media:content.media:text: OnePlus's Never Settle motto on the OnePlus 15's display
media:content.media:title: OnePlus's Never Settle motto on the OnePlus 15's display

item.title: Samsung shows off ultra-bright XR displays that could power future smart glasses
item.description: Samsung's new 40,000-nit XR displays could finally make slimmer AR glasses practical, but real-world products still need to prove they're more than flashy demos.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Samsung Display RGB OLEDoS exhibit at AWE USA 2026
media:content.media:text: Samsung Display RGB OLEDoS exhibit at AWE USA 2026
media:content.media:title: Samsung Display RGB OLEDoS exhibit at AWE USA 2026

item.title: Viture, Nvidia XR AI partner for safety glasses that bring true smarts to the workforce
item.description: Viture, Nvidia revealed the Helix safety smart glasses at AWE 2026, and these glasses feature strong AI for "assisted workflows."
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Viture Helix safety smart glasses powered by Nvidia XR AI.
media:content.media:text: The Viture Helix safety smart glasses powered by Nvidia XR AI.
media:content.media:title: The Viture Helix safety smart glasses powered by Nvidia XR AI.

item.title: Brand New Day: Samsung's foldables swing with Spider-Man, but you'll need the Spidey Tracker
item.description: Samsung, Spider-Man: Brand New Day swing into a real-world collaboration with the movie's Spidey Tracker.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung partners with Sony and Spider-Man: Brand New Day to showcase the usefulness of its foldables and watches with the Spidey Tracker.
media:content.media:text: Samsung partners with Sony and Spider-Man: Brand New Day to showcase the usefulness of its foldables and watches with the Spidey Tracker.
media:content.media:title: Samsung partners with Sony and Spider-Man: Brand New Day to showcase the usefulness of its foldables and watches with the Spidey Tracker.

item.title: Early Prime Day deals on wireless headphones and earbuds — my TOP 15+ picks under $200
item.description: Amazon's Big Sale is just days away, but you don't need to wait to find a wireless headphones or earbuds deal under $200.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Taking a closer look at the padding on Nothing Headphones (a)
media:content.media:text: Taking a closer look at the padding on Nothing Headphones (a)
media:content.media:title: Taking a closer look at the padding on Nothing Headphones (a)

item.title: Wear OS 7 is here with better battery life and a massive smart home upgrade
item.description: Wear OS 7 brings smarter features, better battery life, and deeper Gemini integration to Pixel Watches, though Google's most exciting AI upgrades are still coming later this year.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Wear OS smartwatches

item.title: Android 17 is finally here — here's what's new and who's getting it

item.title: Google's June Pixel Drop is rolling out, and we're unraveling what's coming with Android 17

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: School's out: Android preps updated parental controls for kids alongside Android 17
item.description: Android 17 is here, and so are Google's updated parental controls for kids as school lets out for the summer.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Parental Controls setup screen on a Pixel running Android 16.
media:content.media:text: The Parental Controls setup screen on a Pixel running Android 16.

item.title: Android XR's biggest hurdle may finally have a solution
item.description: Qualcomm's latest XR chip is designed to power the Android XR ecosystem.

media:content.media:description: Ray-Ban Meta limited edition transparent smart glasses.

item.title: Get it reserved: Xreal's Aura smart glasses refresh the game with powerful Android XR and AI
item.description: Xreal debuted its Project Aura smart glasses, which offer a lightweight, multimodal AI experience with a wide FOV for its virtual display.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Xreal Aura launches, but availability waits for this fall.
media:content.media:text: Xreal Aura launches, but availability waits for this fall.
media:content.media:title: Xreal Aura launches, but availability waits for this fall.

item.title: Why wait for Prime Day? The 'fantastic' Nothing Phone (3) has already scored a record-smashing discount at Amazon
item.description: The Nothing Phone (3) is one of the most unique phones on the market, and thanks to this early Prime Day deal, you can grab the device for its lowest price ever recorded.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Nothing Phone 3 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Nothing Phone 3 review on Android Central

item.title: Vivo’s next Samsung Galaxy Z Fold rival just revealed its biggest strengths

item.title: Commodore is back with a de-Googled feature phone for the anti-doomscrolling crowd
item.description: Commodore's Callback 8020 strips away social media and distractions, betting that burned-out users want a simpler phone without giving up the essentials.

item.title: Your inbox might finally get quieter now that Google is taking down a major AI scam ring
item.description: Google is teaming up with the FBI to sue the massive scam ring that weaponized Gemini to flood your phone with phishing texts.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Using the new Gemini 3 and Nano Banana Pro models in the Gemini app.

item.title: Should you wait for the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8?
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 isn't that far away, but fears of a price hike make the decision to wait or to buy complicated. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: Escaping the loop? Google speaks up about that huge Pixel booting problem

item.title: Synology DiskStation DS225+ long-term review: This 2.5GbE NAS is finally a good upgrade
item.description: The DiskStation DS225+ has a solitary upgrade over the DS224+: you get 2.5GbE connectivity. That alone is enough to give it an edge, and you still get class-leading software and a great all-round 2-bay NAS server.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Synology DiskStation DS225+ NAS review and testing
media:content.media:text: Synology DiskStation DS225+ NAS review and testing
media:content.media:title: Synology DiskStation DS225+ NAS review and testing

item.title: This Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 battery leak has me more excited than any new AI feature
item.description: The Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 could finally bring the battery boost Wear OS users have wanted for years, with leaks pointing to more than three days of runtime.

item.title: Nobody understands smartphone design like Motorola, and I'm totally surprised by how good the Motorola Edge 2026 is

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 vs. Galaxy Watch 8: Should you play the waiting game?
